proposal.hypothesis: A longer low-rate run may learn to decode the explicit four-step delay history without destabilizing the analytic prior.
proposal.expectedEffect: Pass every held-out delay and compound-disturbance gate.

gateReasons: reset-d: survival 0.648 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-20ms: forward progress 0.000 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-60ms: survival 0.540 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-60ms: lateral drift 0.524 exceeds gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-plus-push: lateral drift 0.318 exceeds gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-plus-reset: survival 0.720 below gate without improving the locked baseline
delay-plus-reset: forward progress 0.000 below gate without improving the locked baseline
